final:
module RefModule(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire rst,  
    input wire [127:0] state_in,  
    input wire [127:0] round_key,  
    output reg [127:0] state_out  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            state_out <= 128'b0;  
        end else begin  
            state_out <= state_in ^ round_key;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
